security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:*; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'

bundle.longDescription: VentureLab is a comprehensive AI-powered toolkit for entrepreneurs, featuring business idea generation, market research, pitch coaching, and product requirement document creation. Supports multiple AI providers including Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google Gemini.
